parameters.content:
## 📋 START HERE — Read Notes

1. Import this workflow
2. Add your Stripe Webhook Secret
3. Connect Supabase & SMTP
4. Connect Slack (optional)
5. Google Sheets (optional)

See `SETUP_GUIDE.md` for full instructions.

## ⚠️ Set Error Workflow

Without this, ALL execution failures are silent — you will never know when the workflow breaks in production.

**How to set it up:**
1. Create a new n8n workflow called 'Error Handler'
2. Add a Webhook trigger (or Error Trigger node)
3. Add a Slack or Email node that sends you the error details
4. Copy that workflow's ID from its URL
5. In THIS workflow, go to Settings (top right) → Error Workflow → paste the ID

See: https://docs.n8n.io/flow-logic/error-handling/

parameters.responseBody: Invalid webhook — Stripe signature verification failed.

nodes.name: Wait: Stage 1
nodes.notes: Timer starts when invoice.payment_failed webhook fires. Stage 1 = first dunning email delay. Default: 4 hours (240 min). Override with DUNNING_WAIT_STAGE_1 env var.

parameters.jsCode:
console.log('[Skip] Invoice already recovered, skipping stage. invoiceId:', $input.first().json.invoiceId || 'unknown');
return $input.all();

parameters.subject: Your payment didn't go through — quick action needed
parameters.html:
Payment Update Required

Hi {{ $json.customerName }},

We attempted to process your payment of {{ $json.amountDue }} {{ $json.currency }}, but it didn't go through.

This is completely normal — it usually happens when a card expires, your bank runs a routine security check, or there's a temporary hold on the account. Nothing to worry about.

A quick card update is all it takes to get things sorted. It should take less than 30 seconds.

Update Payment Details →

If you've already updated your payment method, you can safely ignore this email.

You're receiving this because your subscription payment didn't process successfully.

smtp.name: SMTP Account
smtp._note: REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL_ID - Create SMTP credential in n8n first (Settings > Credentials)

nodes.name: Wait: Stage 2
nodes.notes: Timer starts when Stage 2 failure event (second invoice.payment_failed) arrives — NOT from when the Stage 1 email was sent. Default: 1 hour (60 min). Override with DUNNING_WAIT_STAGE_2 env var.

parameters.subject: Second notice: Your payment is still failing
parameters.html:
Payment Still Failing

Hi {{ $json.customerName }},

We tried to charge your card again for {{ $json.amountDue }} {{ $json.currency }}, but unfortunately the payment still didn't go through.

Your account is still fully active right now, but we do need this resolved soon to keep everything running smoothly for you.

⚠️ Heads up: If the payment continues to fail, we'll need to pause your account to comply with our billing policy. We'd really rather not do that.

Update Payment Method →

Need help? Just reply to this email — a real person will get back to you.

This is the second notice regarding your subscription payment of {{ $json.amountDue }} {{ $json.currency }}.

nodes.name: Wait: Stage 3
nodes.notes: Timer starts when Stage 3 failure event (third invoice.payment_failed) arrives — NOT from when the Stage 2 email was sent. Default: 24 hours (1440 min). Override with DUNNING_WAIT_STAGE_3 env var.

parameters.subject: Your account is at risk — please act today
parameters.html:
Action Required — Account Suspension Imminent

Hi {{ $json.customerName }},

We've now attempted to process your payment of {{ $json.amountDue }} {{ $json.currency }} multiple times without success. We need to hear from you today.

🚨 Your account will be suspended if payment is not resolved.

Here's what you'll lose access to:

  • All active workflows and automations
  • Execution history and logs
  • Connected integrations and API keys
  • Saved templates and configurations

We genuinely do not want this to happen. Updating your payment method takes less than a minute and keeps everything running.

Resolve Now — Keep My Account →

If there's a billing issue we can help with, please reply to this email and we'll work it out together.

This is an urgent notice — your account will be paused if payment of {{ $json.amountDue }} {{ $json.currency }} is not received.

nodes.name: Wait: Stage 4
nodes.notes: Timer starts when Stage 4 failure event (fourth/final invoice.payment_failed) arrives — NOT from when the Stage 3 email was sent. Default: 72 hours (4320 min). Override with DUNNING_WAIT_STAGE_4 env var.

parameters.subject: Your subscription has been paused — reactivate anytime
parameters.html:
Your Subscription Has Been Paused

Hi {{ $json.customerName }},

After several attempts, we were unable to process your payment of {{ $json.amountDue }} {{ $json.currency }}, so your subscription has been paused.

There is absolutely no judgment here — life happens, cards expire, and sometimes things just slip through the cracks. We get it.

✅ Your data is completely safe. Nothing has been deleted. All your workflows, history, and configurations are exactly where you left them. Whenever you're ready, you can pick up right where you left off.

Reactivate My Account →

We'd love to hear from you — if there's anything we could have done differently, or if there's a reason you decided to move on, just hit reply. We read every response and it genuinely helps us improve.

We hope to see you back soon.

Your subscription has been paused. Reactivate anytime — your data will be waiting for you.

slackApi.name: Slack Account
slackApi._note: REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_SLACK_CREDENTIAL_ID - Create Slack OAuth2 credential in n8n first (Settings > Credentials)

documentId._note: REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID - Create sheet in Google Drive, then add Google Sheets OAuth2 credential in n8n

nodes.name: Google Sheets: Log Event
nodes.notes: Optional node — safe to disable. Core data is in Supabase. Google OAuth tokens expire periodically; re-authenticate in n8n credentials if this node fails.

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: Google Sheets Account
googleSheetsOAuth2Api._note: REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEETS_CREDENTIAL_ID - Create Google Sheets OAuth2 API credential in n8n first (Settings > Credentials)

parameters.text:
={{ $json.slackUrgencyEmoji || '' }} 🎉 *Payment Recovered!*

✅ *{{ $json.customerName }}* ({{ $json.customerEmail }}) just paid *{{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.amountRecovered }}*

💰 Revenue saved! The dunning sequence worked.

parameters.subject: quick heads up — payment didn't go through
parameters.html:
Hey {{ $json.customerName }} 👋

Just a quick heads up — your payment of {{ $json.amountDue }} {{ $json.currency }} didn't go through.

Happens all the time. Expired card, bank being cautious, the usual stuff. Nothing to stress about.

It's a 30-second fix:

Fix my payment →

That's it. Thanks for being here 🙏

Automated payment notice

parameters.subject: still failing — want us to help sort this?
parameters.html:
Hey {{ $json.customerName }},

We tried charging your card again for {{ $json.amountDue }} {{ $json.currency }} — still no luck.

Your account is still active and everything's working fine. But we do need this sorted before the next retry, or we'll have to pause things on our end.

Quickest way to fix it:

Update my card ✏️

Having trouble? Just reply to this email — we read every one.

Second payment notice for {{ $json.amountDue }} {{ $json.currency }}

parameters.subject: we really don't want to lose you — 2 mins to fix this
parameters.html:
Hey {{ $json.customerName }},

I'll be straight with you — this is the last step before we have to pause your account.

Your payment of {{ $json.amountDue }} {{ $json.currency }} has now failed three times. We've held off as long as we can, but our billing system will automatically suspend access after this.

If you're going through a tough stretch right now, just reply and tell us. We're real people and we're happy to work something out. Seriously.

Otherwise, two minutes is all it takes:

Keep my account running →

We really don't want to see you go.

Final payment notice before account suspension

parameters.subject: your account's paused — but you can come back anytime
parameters.html:
Hey {{ $json.customerName }},

Your subscription has been paused. No drama, no hard feelings.

Your data is 100% safe — all your workflows, settings, and history are exactly where you left them. Nothing gets deleted.

Whenever you're ready to come back, it's a one-click thing:

Come back 🌱

One last thing — if there's a reason you decided to leave, we'd genuinely love to hear it. No survey, no form. Just hit reply and tell us in a sentence. It helps more than you'd think.

Take care,
The team

Your subscription is paused. Come back anytime — we'll keep the lights on for you.
